---
title: "Analyzing US Census Data"
author: "Avinesh Saravana"
format: html
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
#| message: false
library(tidyverse)
library(tidycensus)
library(sf)
```

```{r}
#| message: false
income_tx <- get_acs(
  geography = "county",
  variables = "B19013_001",
  state = "TX",
  year = 2020,
  survey = "acs5",
  geometry = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
ggplot(income_tx) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = estimate), color = NA) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(labels = scales::label_dollar()) +
  labs(
    title = "Texas County Median Household Income (2020)",
    fill = "Median income"
  )
```
